ksa_text: Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI systems, including designing human-machine interfaces for effective oversight, specifying human-in-the-loop protocols and escalation triggers, and assigning and validating competency of oversight personnel.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-004 (AI Governance/Skill) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.583, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.583). Core signal: 0, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. AI Governance at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for AI/ML Specialist (DoD).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.583, and AI Governance (AG) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
